candidates.why: Generic operating D&A line, but nothing indicates it belongs to or sits alongside the selected COGS bucket 'Publisher and revenue share cost'. No explicit COGS/COR-linked D&A row is shown.
Generic depreciation line with no indication it is tied to cost of revenue / publisher share cost.
Generic amortization line, not specifically linked to COGS and therefore risky to add to the selected COGS bucket.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific D&A row appears in the operating section. The visible D&A rows are generic operating lines and should not be assigned to the selected COGS row 'Publisher and revenue share cost'.

candidates.why: Best same-level operating D&A summary row to add separately relative to selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows ('Employee benefits expense', 'Other Operating Expenses', 'Research & Development'). It appears as its own operating line rather than a subcomponent of those selected buckets.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit R&D-related amortization exists, but the separate above-EBIT 'Research & Development' row is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so adding this separately would risk distortion/double counting under the R&D interaction rule.
Potential component of the D&A summary; should not be chosen if the summary row is used.
Potential component of the D&A summary; should not be chosen if the summary row is used.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and amortization expenses - Balancing value
candidates.why: Appears to be a balancing/component line rather than the preferred summary row.
Appears to be a balancing/component line rather than the preferred summary row.

variables.notes: Use the operating D&A summary row for XSGA_DA because it is presented separately from the selected XSGA component buckets and should be added later rather than assumed embedded in them. Do not separately add 'Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses' because 'Research & Development' is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD. Manual review is needed because the excerpt contains two rows with the identical label 'Depreciation and amortization expenses', making the physical row reference ambiguous.
